name: huawei-firewall-security-policy-deny-to-h3c
source_config:
#
firewall zone trust
 set priority 85
#
zone name DMZ
 set priority 50
#
security-policy
 rule name TRUST-TO-DMZ
  source-zone trust
  destination-zone DMZ
  source-address 192.168.1.0 mask 255.255.255.0
  destination-address 10.0.0.0 mask 255.255.255.0
  action permit
 rule name DENY-ALL
  source-zone trust
  destination-zone DMZ
  action deny
#
